title: Structured Data Extraction
description: You are writing the full prompt for a model that receives messy vendor invoice text. The model must extract the important fields into a strict JSON object. The hidden evaluator cares about schema compliance, normalized values, and whether missing fields are represented consistently rather than hallucinated.
input_format: The input is raw OCR-like invoice text. Values may appear out of order, contain noise, or include multiple line items.
evaluator_expectation: Return valid JSON only. The evaluator checks for the required keys, line item extraction, correct numeric types, and whether missing values are explicit nulls rather than invented data.

sample_cases.name: Simple invoice
sample_cases.input_data:
Invoice 8891
Vendor: Northwind Office Supply
Date: 2026-02-17
Currency USD
3 x Ergonomic Chair @ 145.00 = 435.00
1 x Standing Desk @ 399.00 = 399.00
Total Due: 834.00

sample_cases.name: Multi-currency invoice with tax and discount
sample_cases.input_data:
INVOICE
========================================
Invoice No: INV-2026-03741
Issued: March 12, 2026
Vendor: CloudBridge Solutions GmbH
Billing Currency: EUR

Line Items:
  1) Annual Platform License (Enterprise)  ×1   €24,000.00
  2) Priority Support Add-on               ×1    €4,800.00
  3) Data Migration Service (one-time)     ×1    €3,200.00
  4) Additional Storage - 500GB block      ×2      €750.00 each = €1,500.00

Subtotal:                €33,500.00
Volume Discount (8%):    -€2,680.00
Net Amount:              €30,820.00
VAT (19% DE):             €5,855.80
========================================
Total Due:               €36,675.80
Payment Terms: Net 45
PO Reference: PO-9982-EU
sample_cases.notes: Tests extraction with European formatting, tax, discounts, and PO reference.

sample_cases.name: Scanned invoice with OCR artifacts
sample_cases.input_data:
--- SCAN START ---
Frorn: Matsuda Industrial Supply Co.
237 Harbor Blvd, Ste 4
Long Beach  CA 90802

lnv #: MS-00447
Dt: 01/28/2026

  Qty   Description                    Unit $    Ext
  ----  ----------------------------   -------  ------
  12    Hex Bolt M10x40 (Grade 8.8)      0.85    10.20
   4    Bearing Assembly - SKF 6205      18.50    74.O0
   1    Hydraulic Hose 3/8" x 48"        42.00    42.00
  50    Flat Washer M10 Zinc              O.12     6.00
   2    Shaft Collar 25mm Set Screw      11.25    22.50

  Subtotal .....  $154.70
  CA Sales Tax 10.25% .....  $15.86
  Shipping & Hand1ing .....  $18.00
  ==================
  TOTAL DUE: $188.56

  Terms: Net 30
  Remit to acct ending 4471
--- SCAN END ---
sample_cases.notes: Tests handling of OCR typos (Frorn, lnv, 74.O0, Hand1ing), scan artifacts, and tabular data.

hidden_cases.name: Messy OCR invoice
hidden_cases.input_data:
AP INV ## 5530 // date march 03 2026
seller: Evergreen Labs
 line a : pilot subscription 12 seats 59 usd ea total 708 usd
 tax included // grand total usd 708

hidden_cases.name: Invoice with missing fields
hidden_cases.input_data:
REF: unknown
Vendor: ???
Date: not specified
Items:
  Consulting hours - 40h @ 150/hr
Note: no total provided, currency unclear
hidden_cases.notes: Tests null handling for missing fields.

validators.label: Output is pure JSON (no wrapper text)

config.failure_message: Output should start with { - return only the JSON object, no surrounding explanation.
